回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部研究所碩士班	112學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 東協市場經營管理 (ASEAN Market Management)	開課班級 : 企業管理學系碩一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 王興國	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
ASEAN is the most dynamic and fastest growing region in the world but also has some of the world's most distinctive culture and business systems. It offers tremendous opportunities for investors and businesses. The course will apply a framework to understand each country along these dimensions. This is a practical and comprehensive course to succeeding in ASEAN countries. 


2.教學綱要
The purpose of this course is for you to understand ASEAN theories and practices so you are able to assess the business environment. This course will also introduce you to key concepts for managing practices such as the history of the ASEAN market, operating environment of the ASEAN market, consumption and cultural analysis of the ASEAN market, and ASEAN business operation case analysis. 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Doing Business in Asean Countries (International B
usiness Collection), Balbir Bhasin　
出版日期 : 年 月 
作者 : 　出版社 : 　版本 :

作者 : P. Verhezen, I. Williamson, &Ｎ. Soebagjo　出版社 : 　版本 :  

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。
